name: GPT-2 영문 동화 생성
story_en:
A children's story.

Once upon a time, there was a children ' s drawing of a girl with a backpack walking down a dirt road. The main character was girl, walking in park. The mood was happy.

The story begins:


 'On the other side is another town.' A boy says this while sitting on his chair and looking at something around him… Something that he couldn't possibly understand but it looked like an adult carrying some sort to carry her bag! He thinks about what could be behind such action for so long before making up several names out loud (like "Safaris" or "'Uzma")…. All these thoughts come back into focus when she starts talking again; then comes after moments later—a little more excited than usual because now everything seems normal as they walk along one footpath which leads through gardens all over here!! Then suddenly stops abruptly….. Suddenly everyone looks scared right away!!! I thought those were not words spoken by somebody who has never been anywhere else during their life except school... It would have seemed absurd if said person hadn´t seen them earlier coming from every direction..... Well we are finally somewhere.... At first sight you may think —this place should look empty? But inside someone
